steps.t: Potential recruits can be found within the walls of the town of Elthengels. Wuscrad has asked you to speak with refugees to Elthengels and to convince…
Wuscrad can be found in the town of Elthengels. Wuscrad awaits news of the potential recruits for the Elthengels militia.
Wuscrad spoke of abandoned homes just north of the town of Elthengels, beyond the gates of town. The Elthengels garrison commander has asked you to se…
Wuscrad can be found in the town of Elthengels. You should return the recovered provisions to Wuscrad in the town of Elthengels.
